class.name: ResonanceGeometry
class.brief_description: Marks mesh surfaces for Steam Audio simulation. Add as child of MeshInstance3D, or of any Node3D when using geometry_override.
class.description: ResonanceGeometry exposes mesh triangles to Steam Audio for occlusion, transmission, and reverb. Normally must be a direct child of a MeshInstance3D. When [member geometry_override] is set, a MeshInstance3D parent is not required—a child of any Node3D suffices; override mesh vertices are in this node's local space (use this node's transform). Assign a ResonanceMaterial to control absorption, scattering, and transmission per surface. All ResonanceGeometry in the scene is used when baking probes.

members.member: Acoustic material for this surface. Controls absorption (low/mid/high), scattering, and transmission. Use presets from addons/nexus_resonance/materials/ (e.g. concrete, glass, wood).
Pre-exported mesh data for dynamic geometry. When set and dynamic=true, loads via iplStaticMeshLoad for better stability and faster runtime. Assigned automatically when using Export Dynamic Mesh.

Optional simplified mesh for Steam Audio. When set, used instead of the parent MeshInstance3D's mesh for export and runtime. Use e.g. BoxMesh for complex geometry to reduce polygon count. When geometry_override is set, a MeshInstance3D parent is not required—the node can be a child of any Node3D.
When true and geometry_override is set, shows the override mesh as a semi-transparent green overlay in the editor viewport. Disable to reduce clutter.
When enabled, geometry of all child nodes (with MeshInstance3D or geometry_override) is exported as acoustic geometry. Same as Steam Audio "Export All Children".
When true, geometry is updated for moving/rotating objects. Enable path validation (runtime default or per-source **Enabled**) when using dynamic geometry that can block baked paths.

method.name: get_mesh_bake_transform
method.description: World transform from mesh vertex space to global space: this node's global transform when [member geometry_override] is set, otherwise the parent [MeshInstance3D]'s global transform (or this node's global if there is no MeshInstance parent). Matches static scene export and runtime acoustic registration.

method.name: export_dynamic_mesh_to_asset
method.description: Export mesh (parent MeshInstance3D or geometry_override if set) to a ResonanceGeometryAsset file. Works in Editor without running the scene. Saves to p_path (.tres) and assigns mesh_asset. Requires a Node3D parent; MeshInstance3D is only needed when geometry_override is unset.

method.name: sync_reflection_debug_viz
method.description: Updates reflection debug overlay geometry only (CPU ray-hit visualization). Does not remove or recreate Steam Audio static or instanced meshes. Prefer this over [method refresh_geometry] when toggling debug flags so dynamic Embree geometry stays valid.
